phasedDeprecationNote: This payment-row view is being phased out in favor of the Outbox/SOAP pipeline. Per-payment retry stays here until migration is complete.

outboxPrimaryBanner.title: Primary pipeline view: FinanzOnline · Outbox
outboxPrimaryBanner.leadBeforeLink: For operational monitoring of the SOAP/outbox pipeline (submission, protocol, retries), use
outboxPrimaryBanner.leadAfterLink: . This screen remains for payment-row status and manual retry per payment (legacy).

simulationBanners.transportSimActive: Simulated FinanzOnline transport active (no real BMF connection on this simulated path).

derivedLegacyTruthAlert.title: Reconciliation row ≠ delivery or terminal truth
derivedLegacyTruthAlert.description: The FO status column (e.g. Pending, Submitted) comes from the payment-row list API. It may diverge from the authoritative outbox. Pending does not automatically mean the SOAP pipeline is still waiting — use outbox status and lifecycle. When an outbox message id is present, use the direct link to open that outbox row.

retry.outboxLifecycleHint: Note: Retry uses the reconciliation retry path for the payment — not the outbox background worker cycle. Verify the outcome in Outbox.

columns.receiptNumberTooltip: Receipt number from the reconciliation list DTO.
columns.paymentTooltip: Payment ID (paymentId) — primary key for retry and links.
columns.legacyFoDerivedSubtitle: FO status from payment row (legacy, not outbox)
columns.protocolSuccessSimulatedColumnNote: ProtocolSuccess is simulated here — not live evidence.
columns.foRefTooltip: finanzOnlineReferenceId — FinanzOnline reference from the list DTO.
columns.outboxIntegratedTooltip: Authoritative SOAP/outbox pipeline: latest outbox row for this payment’s invoice aggregate. Transport path (simulated vs real SOAP TEST/PROD) comes from the outbox row and live transport configuration.
columns.referenceFoIntegratedTooltip: finanzOnlineReferenceId from the list DTO (payment row, legacy). Prefer the outbox column for transmission and protocol evidence.
columns.amountTooltip: totalAmount — payment amount in the list DTO.
columns.rawRegisterVisible: Raw value shown; no UUID for safe register URLs.

transportSurfaceBadge.simulated: List surface · transport: simulated (not BMF live)
transportSurfaceBadge.real: List surface · transport: real SOAP path (TEST/PROD per configuration)

expandRow.openHandoffOutboxSameCase: Open the same outbox message in Outbox (deep link)
expandRow.protocolSuccessSimulatedExpandNote: Note: with simulated transport, ProtocolSuccess is not evidence of live BMF acceptance.
